home-brand-story.query: Quiet Luxury, Everyday Elegance Velmora was born from a desire to bridge the gap between costume jewelry and fine luxury. We believe in crafting pieces that look and feel like heirlooms, using premium materials without the traditional markup. Each piece is designed to be lived in, loved, and layered.
